children.heading: Delinquent borrowers prohibited from obtaining direct operating loans
children.label: a Delinquent borrowers prohibited from obtaining direct operating loans
children.text: The Secretary may not make a direct operating loan under subchapter II to a borrower who is delinquent on any loan made or guaranteed under this chapter.

children.heading: Prohibition of loans for borrowers that have received debt forgiveness
children.label: b Prohibition of loans for borrowers that have received debt forgiveness
A
children.text: the Secretary may not make a loan under this chapter to a borrower that has received debt forgiveness on a loan made or guaranteed under this chapter; and

children.label: i
children.text: debt forgiveness after , on a loan made or guaranteed under this chapter; orApril 4, 1996

children.label: ii
children.text: received debt forgiveness on more than 3 occasions on or before .April 4, 1996

children.label: i
children.text: was restructured with a write-down under ;section 2001 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: is current on payments under a confirmed reorganization plan under chapters 11, 12, or 13 of title 11; or1So in original. Probably should be “chapter”.1

children.label: iii
children.text: received debt forgiveness on not more than 1 occasion resulting directly and primarily from a major disaster or emergency designated by the President on or after , under the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act ( et seq.).April 4, 199642 U.S.C. 5121

children.label: I
children.text: on or before , received not more than 1 debt forgiveness on a loan made or guaranteed under this chapter; andApril 4, 1996

children.label: II
children.text: after , has not received debt forgiveness on a loan made or guaranteed under this chapter.April 4, 1996

children.heading: Restructured loans
children.label: ii Restructured loans
children.text: For purposes of clause (i), a borrower who was restructured with a write-down or restructuring under shall not be considered to have received debt forgiveness on a loan made or guaranteed under this chapter.section 2001 of this title

children.heading: No more than 1 debt forgiveness for borrower on direct loan
children.label: c No more than 1 debt forgiveness for borrower on direct loan
children.text: The Secretary may not provide to a borrower debt forgiveness on a direct loan made under this chapter if the borrower has received debt forgiveness on another direct loan made under this chapter.
